query:
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, rating,
  taxaIndicativa,
  ROUND(taxaIndicativa*100,4) as taxa_pct_se_decimal,
  durationAnos, ntnbReferencia, ntnbTaxa, zspread,
  ROUND(zspread*10000,1) as spread_bps,
  indexador
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE indexador LIKE '%IPCA%'
ORDER BY zspread ASC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3TCbxwuMo8bqgEH.3d9f28c4dd9f --database ibSgD3x7K24f8UHUmWHZV3 --execute 
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, rating,
  taxaIndicativa,
  ROUND(taxaIndicativa*100,4) as taxa_pct_se_decimal,
  durationAnos, ntnbReferencia, ntnbTaxa, zspread,
  ROUND(zspread*10000,1) as spread_bps,
  indexador
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE indexador LIKE '%IPCA%'
ORDER BY zspread ASC
LIMIT 10;
